Physics Effects Library

Overview

Physics Effects is a physics simulation library that simulates object behaviors.

Explanation

This library is used by the Trigger Effect and Vibration Tutorial (sample_code\input_output_devices\tutorial_trigger_effect_and_vibration) to carry out physics simulation.

Note

  • Only the source code is provided by this library. There is no SDK document available that describes the specifications of this library.
  • We're sorry that we're unable to accept questions regarding this library or requests for feature expansions.
  • Only the behavior of API features used in tutorial_trigger_effect_and_vibration, demo_propagation_3d_audio or demo_vr_headset_vibration has been verified.
[About the Use of the Source Code]
The provided sample code can be used for reference purposes; however, please note that support and operation guarantee are not provided.
